brightsmith_agentAttribution.reasoning: Gold zone thread of OEWS wage-distribution columns through the FutureProof engine into consumable.program_career_paths. Reads consumable.occupation_profiles (now carrying wage_p10/p25/p75/p90 from the OEWS LEFT JOIN), threads the four columns through the PCP_SQL CTE alongside the existing occupation context (median_annual_wage, growth_category, etc), and surfaces them as native columns on consumable.program_career_paths. Schema evolved from 57 to 61 NestedFields; new IDs 58-61 reserved per spec §Iceberg NestedField IDs. Overwrite mode used because the grain (unitid x cipcode x soc_code) is unchanged but every row needs the four new column values landed. Result: 603,357 of 626,406 rows (96.32%) carry non-null wage_p25 — coverage is lower than at the occupation_profiles layer because the SOC distribution in PCP is dominated by a handful of high-volume SOCs and a long tail of CIP-mapped SOCs without OEWS rows. consumable.career_branches re-promoted in the same engine run but is unchanged by this spec (no wage_p* columns added to that schema).

documentation.description: Thread the four OEWS wage-distribution columns (wage_p10/p25/p75/p90) from consumable.occupation_profiles into consumable.program_career_paths via the existing CIP-prefix INNER JOIN. The PCP_SQL CTE was extended to SELECT op.wage_p10/p25/p75/p90 alongside the existing occupation_profiles columns; no other engine logic changed. Schema evolved from 57 to 61 NestedFields with new IDs 58-61. Existing pentagon stats, boss scores, match quality, and confidence tier derivations are byte-identical before and after this change.

wage_p10.transformationDescription: Direct carry from consumable.occupation_profiles via the existing soc_code LEFT JOIN. NULL when the row's SOC has no OEWS data or when the BLS join missed entirely (match_quality = 'scorecard_only').

wage_p25.transformationDescription: Direct carry from consumable.occupation_profiles. Lower bound of the user-facing 'typical range' on CareerCard.

wage_p75.transformationDescription: Direct carry from consumable.occupation_profiles. Upper bound of the user-facing 'typical range' on CareerCard.

wage_p90.transformationDescription: Direct carry from consumable.occupation_profiles. Top-coded at 239200 for high-earning SOCs.
